theme.name: Swiss & High-Contrast
theme.description: Objective, rigid, functional. The UI is 95% monochrome dark with color used exclusively to guide action and indicate status. Inspired by high-end developer tools and command centers.

spacing_and_layout.layout_strategy: Control Room Grid (Dense, functional, F-Pattern hierarchy)
rules: Use sharp edges or subtle roundness (max 8px).
Containers with border must have internal padding (p-6).
Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 for dashboard metrics.
Sidebar navigation should be collapsible and sticky.

components.cards: bg-neutral-900 border border-neutral-800 rounded-md shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 hover:border-neutral-700

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-neutral-400 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none ring-offset-neutral-950 bg-white text-black hover:bg-neutral-200 h-10 py-2 px-4
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-neutral-400 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none ring-offset-neutral-950 border border-neutral-800 bg-transparent hover:bg-neutral-800 text-white h-10 py-2 px-4

components.inputs: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-neutral-800 bg-neutral-950 px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-neutral-950 file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-neutral-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-neutral-400 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 text-white
components.tabs: Flat underline or sharp box active state. Override default shadcn rounded pills. Text should be neutral-400 for inactive, white for active.
components.badges: inline-flex items-center rounded border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-400 focus:ring-offset-2 ring-offset-neutral-950
components.table: w-full text-sm text-left. Header row should have border-b border-neutral-800 text-neutral-400. Rows should have border-b border-neutral-800/50 hover:bg-neutral-900/50.

interactions.hover_states: Interactive elements must slightly lift (-translate-y-0.5) or lighten background/border. Must explicitly set text color on hover.
interactions.focus_states: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-neutral-950 for high contrast accessibility.
interactions.animations: Subtle and fast. transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a clean, technical look. Icon size 16px to 20px (w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5).

product_packaging.description: Face mask sheet boxes for various skin concerns are shown.
A box of hydration+ face sheet masks.

manufacturers.description: Empty industrial warehouse with polished concrete floor
Spacious and modern food production plant interior with industrial machinery and processing line.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme colors provided. Avoid using fully transparent backgrounds over any data-heavy section.
Utilize Shadcn components for complex interactions (Dropdowns, Modals, Tabs, Tables) but customize their tailwind classes to match the rigid, sharp-edged, high-contrast aesthetic.
For the Timeline Analysis page, use custom HTML/CSS (divs with absolute positioning or flexbox) for Gantt-like progress bars, ensuring they are accessible and color-coded by status.
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='create-project-btn').
Never use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for headings. Implement Clash Display (from Fontshare) for headings and Manrope for body text.
Do not use placeholder image services like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided URLs in the media section.
Ensure every page features a visible sidebar navigation and a sticky header with a backdrop blur (e.g., backdrop-blur-xl bg-neutral-950/80).
